headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Expand Energy, Raises Price Target to $138
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Mark Lear   maintains Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $136 to $138.
